creator: bsdpr@phoe.frmug.org
text:
The current port graphics/povray37 is for version 3.7.0.RC6, POV-ray version 3,7,0 was released on november 6th, 2013. Please update the port to the released version.
The default version in graphics/povray-meta could also be bumped to 37.
See https://github.com/POV-Ray/povray/releases/tag/v3.7.0.0
